'''Grees''' was a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] who, along with [[Sligh]] and [[Emala]], formed the dubious group the [[Directors]]. For a while they made their profits by selling information they had collected to the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]], but later they found a new break on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Squibs "helped" [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]] during their skirmishes on Tatooine while trying to obtain the [[Moss painting/Legends|moss painting]] ''[[Killik Twilight]]''. They realized that selling information to the [[Imperial Remnant]] would be more profitable, and later started [[Second Mistake Enterprises]].

After surviving the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] he became a war profiteer along with Sligh and Emala during the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]]-[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Swarm War]]. After being sabotaged by the Solos, they took out a bounty on each of the family's heads.

==Biography==
Providing it to the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] (NRI) agency, the trio worked out of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Grees accompanied Leia Organa Solo and her husband, Han Solo, to Tatooine, in attempting to capture a lone group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] in [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|search]] of the ''Killik Twilight''. After their debacle with the Solos, the Squibs decided that selling art to the Imperials would garner them wealth and knowledge about the secretive [[Imperial Remnant]]. Aligned with the [[Invisible Shell]], they did nothing to correct the NRI's assumption that it was [[Ludlo Lebauer]] providing the artworks to the Empire, because it allowed for a distraction from their organization. Grees, however, became too greedy and wasted their scapegoat by becoming his prisoner. Frozen in carbonite, Emala and Sligh once more manipulated the Solos in order for them to help them. Arranging a meeting via their NRI contacts, the Squibs and the Solos met on [[Pavo Prime/Legends|Pavo Prime]] and agreed to combine forces in order to re-obtain Grees and ten [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[boasa]]s. After completing the mission, the Directors quickly fled for the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

After the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]], the group formed a new organization known as [[Second Mistake Enterprises]]. Hired by [[the Colony]] to transport [[spinglass]] sculptures to the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], they were responsible for the near disastrous invasion of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] capital ships by [[Gorog]] assassins. After they were reprimanded, the Directors planned several assassination plots against Han, Leia, and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], all of which failed.
